# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-example-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: example-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: allowed-client-app
    - ipBlock:
        cidr: 10.244.0.0/16
    ports:
    - port: "80"
      protocol: HTTP

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-example-service-https
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: example-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - serviceAccountSelector:
        matchLabels:
          role: backend
      podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: another-allowed-client-app
    ports:
    - port: "443"
      protocol: HTTPS
